Operation 'getCompanyDistanceAndTime' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Operation has no description and vague summary. Added context about what statistics are retrieved, what inputs are expected (company identifier and filters), what outputs are returned (distance/time metrics), and the operational purpose for AI agents to understand when to use this endpoint.

data.current_summary: Get distance and time for single company
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve distance and time statistics for company
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves distance and time statistics for a specified company. Accepts company identifier and optional filtering parameters to calculate aggregate distance traveled and time spent. Returns statistical metrics including total distance, average time, and related measurements. Useful for analyzing company-level signing activity patterns and geographic distribution.
data.reasoning: Operation has no description and vague summary. Added context about what statistics are retrieved, what inputs are expected (company identifier and filters), what outputs are returned (distance/time metrics), and the operational purpose for AI agents to understand when to use this endpoint.

message: Operation 'watchlistPersonLookup' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Operation has no description. Enhanced summary for clarity and added comprehensive description explaining the compliance purpose, input schema context, expected output (match results and risk assessment), and the operational context within the onboarding/signing workflow for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: PEP and sanction lookup for person
data.summary_suggestion: Check person against PEP and sanction watchlists
data.description_suggestion: Performs a compliance check by looking up a person against Politically Exposed Person (PEP) and international sanction watchlists. Accepts person details via WatchListRequestPublic schema. Returns match results indicating whether the person appears on any watchlists, with risk assessment details. Used for compliance verification during onboarding and signing processes.
data.reasoning: Operation has no description. Enhanced summary for clarity and added comprehensive description explaining the compliance purpose, input schema context, expected output (match results and risk assessment), and the operational context within the onboarding/signing workflow for better AI agent interpretability.

Enhanced summary for clarity and added comprehensive description explaining the compliance purpose, input schema context, expected output (match results and risk assessment), and the operational context within the onboarding/signing workflow. Clarified that company lookups may include beneficial owner checks for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: PEP and sanction lookup for company
data.summary_suggestion: Check company against PEP and sanction watchlists
data.description_suggestion: Performs a compliance check by looking up a company against Politically Exposed Person (PEP) and international sanction watchlists. Accepts company details via WatchListCompanyRequestPublic schema. Returns match results indicating whether the company or its beneficial owners appear on any watchlists, with risk assessment details. Used for compliance verification during onboarding and signing processes.
data.reasoning: Operation has no description. Enhanced summary for clarity and added comprehensive description explaining the compliance purpose, input schema context, expected output (match results and risk assessment), and the operational context within the onboarding/signing workflow. Clarified that company lookups may include beneficial owner checks for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateSequentialSignee' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing description entirely. Added context about what can be updated, the request/response schemas involved, and side effects of modifications on the signing process. data.description_suggestion: Updates the properties of a signee within a sequential signing sequence. Accepts an UpdateSequentialSignee request body containing the fields to modify (e.g., email, name, authentication method). Returns the updated SequentialSigningSignee object. Changes take effect immediately and may affect the signee's ability to proceed with signing if critical fields are modified.
data.reasoning: Missing description entirely. Added context about what can be updated, the request/response schemas involved, and side effects of modifications on the signing process. This helps AI agents understand the operation's scope and consequences.

message: Operation 'removeSequentialSignee' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_side_effects. Missing description entirely. Added context about the operation's effect on the signee's access, the irreversibility of the action, and what happens if re-participation is needed. This clarifies the destructive nature of the operation for AI agents.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a signee from a sequential signing sequence. The signee will no longer be able to access or sign documents in this sequence. Returns a 200 status on successful removal. This action cannot be undone - the signee must be re-added if they need to participate in the sequence again.
data.reasoning: Missing description entirely. Added context about the operation's effect on the signee's access, the irreversibility of the action, and what happens if re-participation is needed. This clarifies the destructive nature of the operation for AI agents.

data.current_summary: Authenticate signee into signing sequence via passcode
data.description_suggestion: Authenticates a signee into a sequential signing sequence using a passcode. Accepts a RequestToViewPasscodeSequence request containing the passcode. On successful authentication, returns a 200 response granting the signee access to view and sign documents in the sequence. The signee must provide the correct passcode to proceed.
data.reasoning: Missing description entirely. Added context about the authentication mechanism, what the request contains, the success condition, and what access is granted. This helps AI agents understand the authentication flow and prerequisites.
